tmpr4
	_str2time
zV^[SMTWF][a-z][a-z], (\d\d) ([JFMASOND][a-z][a-z]) (\d\d\d\d) (\d\d):(\d\d):(\d\d) GMT$z+^(?:Sun|Mon|Tue|Wed|Thu|Fri|Sat)[a-z]*,?\s*a
    (\d\d?)            # day
       (?:\s+|[-\/])
    (\w+)              # month
        (?:\s+|[-\/])
    (\d+)              # year
    (?:
          (?:\s+|:)    # separator before clock
       (\d\d?):(\d\d)  # hour:min
       (?::(\d\d))?    # optional seconds
    )?                 # optional clock
       \s*
    (?:
       ([-+]?\d{2,4}|(?![APap][Mm]\b)[A-Za-z]+) # timezone
       \s*
    )?
    (?:
       \(\w+\)         # ASCII representation of timezone in parens.
       \s*
    )?$c
)	Nr
STRICT_DATE_REr@
groupsrI
floatr,
lstrip
WEEKDAY_RE
LOOSE_HTTP_DATE_RErU
textrE
	http2time
    (\d{4})              # year
       [-\/]?
    (\d\d?)              # numerical month
       [-\/]?
    (\d\d?)              # day
   (?:
         (?:\s+|[-:Tt])  # separator before clock
      (\d\d?):?(\d\d)    # hour:min
      (?::?(\d\d(?:\.\d*)?))?  # optional seconds (and fractional)
   )?                    # optional clock
      \s*
   (?:
      ([-+]?\d\d?:?(:?\d\d)?
       |Z|z)             # timezone  (Z is "zero meridian", i.e. GMT)
      \s*
   )?$c
